testcase.name: test_disabled_mobile_recharge_blocks_request
testcase.failure: tests/test_service_toggles.py:139: in test_disabled_mobile_recharge_blocks_request assert request_response.status_code == 503, f"Expected 503, got {request_response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 503, got 520 E assert 520 == 503 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_disabled_gift_voucher_blocks_request
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:976: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_service_toggles.py:290: in test_disabled_gift_voucher_blocks_request error_detail = request_response.json().get("detail", "") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:980: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
